about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.description: GROPPI is a digital marketing bureau pioneering the use of AI in content creation and marketing services. Our commitment to innovation and quality has made us a trusted partner for businesses across Europe.
about.missionText: To deliver exceptional digital solutions that exceed expectations and drive measurable business growth.
about.visionText: To be the leading digital marketing agency leveraging AI for creative excellence.
about.valuesText: Innovation, Transparency, Quality, and Client Success.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Solutions

ads.title: Advertising Management
ads.description: Strategic ad campaigns across Google, Meta, and other platforms. Data-driven optimization for maximum ROI.

seo.description: Improve your organic visibility and rank higher on search engines. Technical SEO, content strategy, and link building.

social.title: Social Media Management

reputation.title: Reputation & Review Management
reputation.description: Build and protect your online reputation. Review management, response strategies, and brand monitoring.

dataSync.title: Data Synchronization
dataSync.description: Keep your business data synchronized across all platforms. Inventory, pricing, and product information management.

ai.title: Powered by AI
ai.description: We leverage cutting-edge artificial intelligence to deliver faster, smarter, and more effective marketing solutions. Our AI-enhanced workflows ensure consistency and quality at scale.
